nl_query: Which configurations at course scope override the global scope setting for the same configuration key, and show the course code, global value, course value, and the data type.
failed_sql: SELECT c1.config_key, c1.config_value AS au_value, c2.config_value AS global_value, c1.data_type FROM configuration c1 JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = c1.scope_id AND c1.scope_type = 'COURSE' JOIN configuration c2 ON c2.config_key = c1.config_key AND c2.scope_type = 'GLOBAL' WHERE au.is_active = TRUE AND c2.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY c1.config_key, c1.config_value, c2.config_value, c1.data_type
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): configuration.is_active. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
